_comment: Scripted intents for NowSpeak (Act 2). Deterministic so the demo never depends on a live LLM. Matched on lowercased substring of the query; falls back to catalog search.

starter_chips: A guest is vegan — what can I make?
Got a headache and we're out of coffee

intents.reply: Got it — Spaghetti Carbonara for 6. I scaled the recipe 3× and added everything you don't already have. Pancetta, parmesan and eggs are the essentials; you're out of parmesan and eggs, so those are in.
One vegan guest? Ratatouille works for the whole table — naturally vegan, nut-free, and pairs with your pasta night. I filtered out anything with dairy or egg and pulled the fresh veg you'll need.
intents.dietary_note: Vegan ✓ · Nut-free ✓ — safe for everyone tonight

intents.reply: Two things, one tap: Dolo 650 for the headache, and your coffee beans — you reorder these every 9 days and it's day 9. Adding both.
High-protein dinner for two: grilled chicken with paneer and a quick salad. ~45g protein a plate, on your doorstep in minutes.

nowspeak.fallback_reply: Here's what I found for that — tap to add anything you need.
